title: Why We're Not Too Late to Stop AI Hackers | Nebulock, Damien Lewke
summary: Damien Lewke argues that AI has dramatically lowered the barrier to launching cyberattacks, enabling two people with a GPU to execute what once required elite teams and years of preparation. He advocates for an "assume breach" defensive posture and identifies three behavioral signals that reveal attackers already inside networks.
writeup: Damien Lewke argues that generative AI has sharply lowered the barrier to launching cyberattacks, letting two people with a GPU execute operations that once demanded elite teams and years of preparation. The video makes the case for an "assume breach" defensive posture, treating networks as already compromised rather than relying on perimeter defense. Lewke identifies three behavioral signals that reveal attackers already operating inside a network, framing threat hunting as the practical response to AI-accelerated offense.
